nodes.label: Money as integer cents + bps
nodes.contributor: rationale: floats lose precision on currency math; bigint cents + basis points keep all arithmetic exact

nodes.label: Idempotency everywhere
nodes.contributor: rationale: Stripe redelivers and does not guarantee ordering; retries must never double-charge/double-transfer

nodes.label: Webhook raw-body signature verification
nodes.contributor: rationale: Next.js App Router requires await req.text() (never req.json() first); runtime='nodejs'; body parsing disabled; signature verify IS the auth (webhooks exempt from CSRF)

nodes.label: DB transactions for multi-table writes
nodes.contributor: rationale: any path writing >=2 tables (subscribe, webhook handlers, refund handling, monthly cron) MUST run in a single transaction (Supabase RPC or BEGIN/COMMIT); half-written state is the #1 source of silent billing bugs

nodes.label: RLS as real enforcement layer
nodes.contributor: rationale: assume the app layer can be bypassed; every table has policies that hold on their own; RLS tests required

nodes.label: Magic-byte upload validation
nodes.contributor: rationale: Content-Type header is client-controlled and trivially spoofed; validate magic bytes server-side; reject SVG (inline SVG is an XSS vector); allow only png/jpg/webp

nodes.label: CSRF guidance
nodes.contributor: rationale: Server Actions ship built-in CSRF tokens; mutating API routes require Supabase session cookie (same-site, httpOnly) or Origin/Referer check against NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL; webhook endpoints exempt because signature verify is the auth

nodes.label: Boot-time env validation (Zod)
nodes.contributor: rationale: missing/malformed env var fails fast with a clear message; server-only vars never importable from client code
